title: Abyssal Nail
description:
A custom Nail design inspired by Hollow Knight, with an Abyssal Twist.
- Made by AltiusGames
body: This Pack Retextures Diamond and Netherite Swords to look like a Hollow Knight Nail weapon, except Abyssal themed. This resourcepack works on 1.21.8 or 1.21.9, and is just a fun little retexture. Texture made by me! AA, pack made by AltiusGames.
